title: Implement Builder-Validator pattern with tool restrictions
source: Claude Code team orchestration best practices — Builder-Validator pattern
description: All agents run with identical permissions. Builder-Validator pattern pairs builders with read-only validators that surface problems without silently fixing them.
proposed_changes: Add --allowed-tools parameter to claude -p. Add validator-morty role with Read+Bash only. Add build-validate-team template. Replace auto-approve with validator pass.
